name: gh-pr-tracker
title: GitHub Pull Requests
description: Track unread pull request activity across your GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repositories from a single Raycast command.
author: oslen

commands.name: unread-menu-bar
commands.title: Unread PR Alert
commands.subtitle: GitHub Pull Requests
commands.description: Menu bar alert showing how many pull requests have unread changes

preferences.name: ghHost
preferences.title: GH Host
preferences.description: GitHub hostname. Leave as github.com unless you use GitHub Enterprise.

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: A PAT with repo read access

preferences.name: repos
preferences.title: Repositories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of repositories in owner/repo format

preferences.name: maxUnreadPrs
preferences.title: Max Unread PRs
preferences.description: Maximum number of pull requests with unread activity to show (1–1000). Default 25.

preferences.name: maxScanPrs
preferences.title: Max PRs to Scan
preferences.description: Safety cap on how many pull requests to fetch while finding unread ones on large repositories (1–1000). Higher is more thorough but slower and uses more memory. Default 150.
